ref_classifications.reason: This is a source citation to Lange's Handbook table 6-7, not a reference to an internal table in Willard chapter 26.
ref_classifications.evidence: The parsed table caption is TABLE 26-1; its source note says: Lange's Handbook of Chemistry, 12th ed., Table 6-7, p. 6-34. The actual internal catalog entry is tbl-26.1.
